title: <div><tt>| P05     | mythic &lt&gt real &amp hidden &lt&gt exposed          | cr
content:
| P05 | mythic <> real & hidden <> exposed | create/destroy | ritual binding |
| P06 | exile <> home & future <> now | open/closed | access channel |
| P07 | divine <> profane & signal <> noise | inside/outside | spatial polarity |
| P08 | body <> ghost & plot <> drift | visible/hidden | UI-state |
| P09 | known <> unknown & fixed <> wild | present/absent | memory locator |
| P10 | flesh <> metal & point <> godview | full/empty | media reservoir |
| P11 | dream <> alert & code <> voice | light/dark | visual scene control |
| P12 | presence <> absence & memory <> moment | good/evil | ethical toggle |
| P13 | linear <> fractured & call <> echo | success/failure | outcome gate |
| P14 | emotion <> logic & center <> periphery | pass/fail | dialogue thread |
